passages.title: Reading Passage B
passages.content: <!-- Example passage body. The uploader only requires non-empty content for the schema and the editor; the actual prose is not used by these example fixtures. Replace with real IELTS passage text when running the uploader end-to-end. -->

questions.instruction: Questions 1-2. Do the following statements agree with the information in the passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.content: 1 Other countries had built underground railways before the Metropolitan line opened.

questions.instruction: Questions 1-2. Do the following statements agree with the information in the passage? Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.
questions.content: 2 The author predicts that the cost of underground travel will continue to rise.
